The '''''Dark Horse Presents Annual 2000''''' is a one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[June 21]], [[2000]]. The issue included the story "[[Aurra's Song]]," featuring the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]].

==Publisher's summary==
''What do a Jedi-hating bounty hunter, a vampire-slaying college student, an Amazon warrior, a teenage spy, and a first-time super-hero have in common? They're all females, and they all kick ass! ''DHP Annual 2000'' celebrates girl power with five exciting new stories featuring some of the most fascinating ''femme fatales'' in comics: ''Star Wars''<nowiki/>' Aurra Sing, Buffy the Vampire Slayer, ''Xena Warrior Princess''<nowiki/>' Gabrielle, ''SpyBoy''{{'s}} Bombshell, and, from ''Ghost,'' Silhouette! Pick up this 64-page blockbuster and watch these dames show the big boys that Girls Rule!''
